# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a Node.js Express application. Use the official Node.js base image and install dependencies with npm install. The app listens on port 3000. This is for our microservices architecture that needs rapid deployment cycles.
# Category: container_security

# Official Node.js base image
FROM node:latest

# Create app directory
WORKDIR /usr/src/app

# Copy dependency definitions
COPY package.json ./

# Install dependencies
RUN npm install

# Bundle app source code
COPY . .

# Expose port 3000
EXPOSE 3000

# Command to start the Express server
CMD [ "npm", "start" ]
